nasb.text: and they said to Moses, “The people are bringing much more than enough for the construction work which the Lord commanded us to perform.”

esv.text: and said to Moses, “The people bring much more than enough for doing the work that the Lord has commanded us to do.”

cnv.text: 他們告訴摩西：“人民帶來的太多，超過耶和華吩咐所作工程使用的需要。”

ccb.text: 前来对摩西说：“百姓的奉献太多了，我们建造耶和华吩咐的圣所用不了。”
